securityhub.standard.standardscontrol.Cf: Provides details about an individual security control. For a list of Security Hub controls, see [Security Hub controls reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/securityhub/latest/userguide/securityhub-controls-reference.html) in the *AWS Security Hub User Guide*.

securityhub.standard.standardscontrol.Re.Description: A user-defined reason for changing a control's enablement status in a specified standard. If you are disabling a control, then this property is required.

securityhub.standard.standardscontrol.St.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the control.
